about.title: ABOUT US
about.subtitle: Building the future of residential construction
about.story: Modern House is a leading Bulgarian company in modern construction, specializing in the design and construction of prefab houses, modular structures, and container solutions. Since our founding, we have been dedicated to the idea that everyone deserves a quality, affordable, and beautiful home.
about.mission: Our mission is to combine innovative construction technologies with attention to detail, creating homes that not only meet the highest quality standards but also reflect the unique style of each client.

features.experience: Years of experience in constructing modern residential buildings
features.materials: We use only high-quality materials from proven suppliers
features.team: Qualified team of engineers, architects, and construction specialists
features.deadlines: We strictly meet the agreed deadlines for every project
features.warranty: We provide full warranty and after-sales service
features.custom: Individual approach to every client and project

containers.title: CONTAINERS
containers.subtitle: Innovative container solutions
containers.description: Container structures are a modern and efficient solution for rapid construction of residential, commercial, and office spaces. Our containers are made from high-quality steel and are fully adapted to your needs.
containers.intro: Container construction offers a unique combination of speed, durability, and flexibility. Each container can be transformed into a modern home, office, or commercial space with full thermal and waterproof insulation.

features.fast: Quick assembly — ready for occupancy in 30–60 days
features.durable: Strong steel construction with a long service life
features.eco: Eco-friendly construction with minimal environmental footprint
features.flexible: Modular design — easy expansion and reconfiguration
features.mobile: Can be relocated to another site when needed
features.affordable: Up to 40% lower cost compared to traditional construction

uses.residential: Residential containers — studios, one and two-bedroom apartments

sipHouse.title: PRESS-PANEL SYSTEM
sipHouse.subtitle: Energy-efficient prefab houses
sipHouse.description: The press-panel system (SIP panels) is a modern construction technology where walls, floors, and roofs are built from pre-made sandwich panels. This system provides excellent thermal insulation and fast construction.
sipHouse.intro: SIP panels consist of two layers of OSB board with high-density polystyrene foam in between. This combination creates an exceptionally strong and well-insulated structure that significantly reduces heating and cooling costs.

features.insulation: High thermal insulation — up to 60% lower energy bills
features.speed: Fast assembly — structure ready in 2–4 weeks
features.soundproof: Excellent sound insulation for a peaceful and comfortable environment

process.design: Design and 3D visualization of your future home
process.production: Production of SIP panels in our factory
process.assembly: Structure assembly — walls, roof, and floors

metalHouse.title: METAL FRAME SYSTEM
metalHouse.subtitle: Strong and durable steel constructions
metalHouse.description: The metal frame system uses light steel framing (LSF) for constructing the load-bearing structure. This technology provides exceptional strength and stability at minimal structural weight.
metalHouse.intro: Steel houses combine industrial strength with modern design. Light steel profiles allow the creation of diverse architectural solutions while ensuring maximum structural stability.

features.lightweight: Lightweight — reduces the load on the foundation
features.precision: Precise factory production with minimal deviations

modularHouse.title: MODULAR HOUSES
modularHouse.subtitle: Flexible and modern modular solutions
modularHouse.description: Modular houses are manufactured in a controlled factory environment and transported to the site for final assembly. This technology guarantees high quality, fast construction, and design flexibility.
modularHouse.intro: Each module is a completed section of your future home — with walls, floor, roof, plumbing, and electrical installations. On site, modules are connected together, allowing a finished home in record time.

features.factory: Factory production — guaranteed quality regardless of weather
features.expandable: Easy expansion — add new modules at any time
features.custom: Full design freedom — choose your layout and materials
features.energy: Energy efficiency class A — minimal maintenance costs
features.transport: Can be relocated to another location

tinyHouse.title: TINY HOUSES
tinyHouse.subtitle: Compact living without compromise
tinyHouse.description: Tiny houses are compact dwellings designed for maximum functionality in a minimal footprint. They can be completely independent from city infrastructure thanks to solar panels, rainwater systems, and composting toilets.
tinyHouse.intro: The tiny house movement is gaining increasing popularity in Bulgaria and worldwide. Our tiny houses combine smart design with eco-friendly technologies to offer you a free and sustainable way of living.

features.offgrid: Full autonomy — solar energy, rainwater, composting
features.compact: Optimized space — every square meter is functional
features.mobile: On wheels — register as a trailer and travel
features.affordable: Affordable price — ideal for a first home or guest house
features.minimal: Minimal maintenance and low living costs
features.eco: Ecological footprint up to 80% lower than a standard home

pvcJoinery.title: PVC WINDOWS & DOORS
pvcJoinery.subtitle: High-quality PVC windows and doors
pvcJoinery.description: Our PVC joinery is manufactured using leading European profile systems and provides excellent thermal and sound insulation. A wide range of colors, designs, and glass units for every taste and budget.
pvcJoinery.intro: PVC joinery is the most popular choice for residential buildings thanks to the excellent price-quality ratio. Our windows and doors are manufactured with multi-chamber profiles and low-emission glass units for maximum energy efficiency.

features.insulation: 5-7 chamber profiles for maximum thermal insulation
features.soundproof: Sound insulation up to 47 dB — peace and quiet at home
features.colors: Over 40 colors and laminates — match your interior
features.hardware: Hardware from leading brands — MACO, Roto, Siegenia
features.glass: Double and triple glazing with low-emission coating
features.warranty: 10-year warranty on profiles, 5 years on hardware

types.tilt: Tilt and turn — classic and practical solution
types.sliding: Sliding — ideal for terraces and balconies
types.fixed: Fixed — for showcases and facade glazing
types.folding: Folding — for maximum opening of the space

aluminumJoinery.title: ALUMINUM JOINERY
aluminumJoinery.subtitle: Elegance and strength for modern spaces
aluminumJoinery.description: Aluminum joinery offers uncompromising strength, elegant appearance, and exceptional weather resistance. Ideal for large glazed areas, facades, and commercial buildings.
aluminumJoinery.intro: Aluminum is the material of the future in joinery. With slim profiles and maximum glazing area, aluminum systems create a modern and luxurious look for any building while providing excellent functionality.

features.slim: Slim profiles — maximum glazing area and more light
features.strong: Exceptional strength — ideal for large dimensions
features.weather: Resistant to all weather conditions — no rust, no deformation
features.design: Modern minimalist design for architectural accents
features.thermal: Thermally broken profiles for high energy efficiency
features.maintenance: Minimal maintenance — easy cleaning and longevity
